tasks.title: Keep the existing chat shell and avoid a major UI rewrite
Wire GET /health into frontend connection state and show it in the header

verification.notes: Header should show connected or unavailable state without changing layout.

tasks.title: Extend thread state with backend session id, phase, status, context, results, and error state

verification.notes: Each local thread should independently track backend intake/generation state.

tasks.title: Add API helpers for health, intake, generation stream, and stored package fetch

verification.notes: Use fetch for JSON routes and fetch plus stream parsing for POST SSE.

tasks.title: Replace local canned replies with POST /intake/message and persist session_id per thread

verification.notes: User messages should drive the live intake loop and support follow-up questions.

tasks.title: Render the completed context as an inline summary card and expose a Generate launch package action

verification.notes: Keep the action inline in the thread rather than introducing a new screen.

tasks.title: Implement POST /generate SSE parsing and phase updates from streamed events

verification.notes: Thread phase and status should react to status, research, eval, offer, page, growth, critique_chunk, complete, and error events.

tasks.title: Render context, research, offer, assets, critique, and error states inside the existing thread surface

verification.notes: Structured outputs should appear without replacing the current conversation layout.

tasks.title: Support GET /p/{slug} retrieval after completion and store backend-relative plus absolute page URLs

verification.notes: Treat /p/{slug} as stored JSON retrieval, not as a separate rendered frontend page.

tasks.title: Verify the frontend builds cleanly and the backend integration points are wired end to end

verification.notes: Run a production build and, if the backend is available locally, exercise the health and intake/generation flows.
